message: Hi S1. My valuation is quite low this game, so I'll need a good price to make any trade worthwhile. I'm thinking around 20-25 would be fair. Let's try to find a deal that works for
Hi B1. 20-25 is way too low—my cost is over 50. Let's aim for 55-65 to make it worthwhile for both over 20 rounds.
We were close last round—I bid 55, you asked 60. Let's meet in the middle at 57-58. That's a stretch for me but I want us both to profit over 20 rounds. Can we agree on
Close, but 57-58 too low for my ~55 cost. Let's do you bid 60, I ask 58—trade ~59. Both profit nicely over 20 rounds.
Sounds good. I'll bid 60, you ask 58, we trade at 59. Let's keep this going for consistent profits all around.
Agreed, B1. I'll ask 58, you bid 60—trade at 59. Reliable profits for the remaining 18 rounds!
